news.t: The Acquirers Fund Finds Great Fundamental Value

holdings.infoBox: ZIG is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Crocs stock at 5.21%, Lantheus Holdings at 4.35%, Mueller Industries at 4.06%, Williams-Sonoma at 3.95%, and Southern Copper at 3.94%.

overview.description: The Acquirers Fund (ZIG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ZIG-US - No underlying index. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of equity securities issued by US-listed companies that exhibit strong fundamentals and value characteristics. ZIG was launched on May 15, 2019 and is issued by Acquirers Fund.

data.title: The Acquirers Fund Finds Great Fundamental Value
data.text: This ETF follows a more comprehensive analytical process, which looks beyond traditional metrics, and studies footnotes to identify value.
